tools.name: changes.dnsChangesCreate
tools.description: Atomically updates the ResourceRecordSet collection.

tools.name: changes.dnsChangesGet
tools.description: Fetches the representation of an existing Change.

tools.name: changes.dnsChangesList
tools.description: Enumerates Changes to a ResourceRecordSet collection.

tools.name: dnsKeys.dnsDnsKeysGet
tools.description: Fetches the representation of an existing DnsKey.

tools.name: dnsKeys.dnsDnsKeysList
tools.description: Enumerates DnsKeys to a ResourceRecordSet collection.

tools.name: managedZoneOperations.dnsManagedZoneOperationsGet
tools.description: Fetches the representation of an existing Operation.

tools.name: managedZoneOperations.dnsManagedZoneOperationsList
tools.description: Enumerates Operations for the given ManagedZone.

tools.name: managedZones.dnsManagedZonesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new ManagedZone.

tools.name: managedZones.dnsManagedZonesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a previously created ManagedZone.

tools.name: managedZones.dnsManagedZonesGet
tools.description: Fetches the representation of an existing ManagedZone.

tools.name: managedZones.dnsManagedZonesGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: managedZones.dnsManagedZonesList
tools.description: Enumerates ManagedZones that have been created but not yet deleted.

tools.name: managedZones.dnsManagedZonesPatch
tools.description: Applies a partial update to an existing ManagedZone.

tools.name: managedZones.dnsManagedZonesSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy. Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.

tools.name: managedZones.dnsManagedZonesTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this returns an empty set of permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.

tools.name: managedZones.dnsManagedZonesUpdate
tools.description: Updates an existing ManagedZone.

tools.name: policies.dnsPoliciesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Policy.

tools.name: policies.dnsPoliciesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a previously created Policy. Fails if the policy is still being referenced by a network.

tools.name: policies.dnsPoliciesGet
tools.description: Fetches the representation of an existing Policy.

tools.name: policies.dnsPoliciesList
tools.description: Enumerates all Policies associated with a project.

tools.name: policies.dnsPoliciesPatch
tools.description: Applies a partial update to an existing Policy.

tools.name: policies.dnsPoliciesUpdate
tools.description: Updates an existing Policy.

tools.name: projects.dnsProjectsGet
tools.description: Fetches the representation of an existing Project.

tools.name: resourceRecordSets.dnsResourceRecordSetsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new ResourceRecordSet.

tools.name: resourceRecordSets.dnsResourceRecordSetsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a previously created ResourceRecordSet.

tools.name: resourceRecordSets.dnsResourceRecordSetsGet
tools.description: Fetches the representation of an existing ResourceRecordSet.

tools.name: resourceRecordSets.dnsResourceRecordSetsList
tools.description: Enumerates ResourceRecordSets that you have created but not yet deleted.

tools.name: resourceRecordSets.dnsResourceRecordSetsPatch
tools.description: Applies a partial update to an existing ResourceRecordSet.

tools.name: responsePolicies.dnsResponsePoliciesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Response Policy

tools.name: responsePolicies.dnsResponsePoliciesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a previously created Response Policy. Fails if the response policy is non-empty or still being referenced by a network.

tools.name: responsePolicies.dnsResponsePoliciesGet
tools.description: Fetches the representation of an existing Response Policy.

tools.name: responsePolicies.dnsResponsePoliciesList
tools.description: Enumerates all Response Policies associated with a project.

tools.name: responsePolicies.dnsResponsePoliciesPatch
tools.description: Applies a partial update to an existing Response Policy.

tools.name: responsePolicies.dnsResponsePoliciesUpdate
tools.description: Updates an existing Response Policy.

tools.name: responsePolicyRules.dnsResponsePolicyRulesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Response Policy Rule.

tools.name: responsePolicyRules.dnsResponsePolicyRulesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a previously created Response Policy Rule.

tools.name: responsePolicyRules.dnsResponsePolicyRulesGet
tools.description: Fetches the representation of an existing Response Policy Rule.

tools.name: responsePolicyRules.dnsResponsePolicyRulesList
tools.description: Enumerates all Response Policy Rules associated with a project.

tools.name: responsePolicyRules.dnsResponsePolicyRulesPatch
tools.description: Applies a partial update to an existing Response Policy Rule.

tools.name: responsePolicyRules.dnsResponsePolicyRulesUpdate
tools.description: Updates an existing Response Policy Rule.
